notes: v0.29.8 — Shop polish round. PROJECTILES and TRAILS now get the same SHARD/BASTION/LANCE/CHORUS class sub-tabs + OWNED/PULSE STORE/SURGE STORE buckets as SHIP SKINS (active class shared across all three tabs). TRAIL card preview restored — each of the 16 trail kinds (cyan_dash, warm_ember, spectrum, glitch_invert, gold_burst, dust, pollen, light_dust, hairline, slice, synth_grid, pulse_chevron, thrust_flame, choir_arc, ash_ash) renders with its own dot style again (the 'same dot only different colour' build was a regression). BOSS KEYS section reverted to the original rich layout (1/5/10/25 key bundles + bonus tiles); sidebar key icon now uses the canonical boss_key_tex art (orange octagon keycard) with slow rotation + glow. PULSEWAVE PRO banner trimmed to just wordmark + animated 'coming soon' line — the feature list was speculation, pulled it.
